items.name: Phone number
items.sourceQuote: Signal requires a phone number to register.

items.name: Message metadata (minimal)
items.sourceQuote: Signal is designed to minimize the data we collect.

collectsPreciseGeolocation.sourceQuote: Signal does not collect location data.

collectsFinancialData.sourceQuote: No financial data is collected from users.

soldToThirdParties.sourceQuote: Signal does not sell, rent, or monetize your personal data or content in any way.

sharedForAdvertising.sourceQuote: Signal does not work with advertisers.

crossSiteTracking.sourceQuote: Signal does not track users across websites.

usedForProfiling.sourceQuote: Signal does not build profiles of its users.

usedToTrainAI.sourceQuote: Signal does not use user data to train AI models.

retention.sourceQuote: Messages are stored only as long as necessary to deliver them.

rightToAccess.sourceQuote: You can request a copy of your data.

rightToDelete.sourceQuote: You can delete your account and all associated data at any time.

rightToCorrect.sourceQuote: No explicit right to correct mentioned in the policy.

rightToOptOut.sourceQuote: You may opt out of any data collection by deleting your account.

honorsGPC.sourceQuote: Signal respects global privacy control signals.

honorsDNT.sourceQuote: Signal respects Do Not Track browser settings.

measures.name: Open-source audited protocol
measures.sourceQuote: Signal Protocol is open source and independently audited.

measures.name: Forward secrecy
measures.sourceQuote: Signal uses forward secrecy to protect past communications.
